---
title: "The Anglo-Saxon poem of Beowulf : The travellers song and The battle of Finnes-burh"
---

## The Anglo-Saxon poem of Beowulf : The travellers song and The battle of Finnes-burh

**Author:** John Mitchell Kemble
**Date:** 1833-1837
**Imprint:** London : W. Pickering

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
